name: apiKey
label: API Key
help: Your PolyDoc API key. Create one at dashboard.polydoc.tech under API Keys. Sent as Authorization: Bearer.

name: sandbox
label: Sandbox
help: Run conversions in sandbox mode: higher quota, watermarked output. Adds the X-Sandbox header to every request.

name: baseUrl
label: Base URL
help: PolyDoc API base URL. Change only for self-hosted or staging environments.
